response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years in the industry. He possesses strong expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) along with hands-on experience in AI agent development, cloud infrastructure, and Java. His profound background in TDD and test framework development perfectly aligns with the required testing expertise, making him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack role despite missing a couple of specific framework keywords.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, and React across high-scale platforms.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and working with Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Exceptional software craftsmanship background with strong advocacy for TDD, CI/CD, and test framework creation.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, though foundational Node.js and testing skills mitigate this.
Has held Staff and Founder titles recently; needs confirmation of willingness to work as a Senior IC.
Missing explicit mention of Python and Kotlin, which were listed in the required and secondary skills.
